task: Flagship expert task: Automotive Battery Pack End-of-Line Warranty Risk Screen. Reality context: an EV battery plant must decide whether suspect packs can ship after end-of-line anomalies. Embedded packet: packs: P1 capacity_kWh=78.4 IR_mohm=42 leak_mbar_min=0.02 balance_mV=18, P2 cap=75.1 IR=61 leak=0.05 balance=42, P3 cap=79.0 IR=39 leak=0.01 balance=22; specs cap>=76, IR<=55, leak<=0.03, balance<=30; rework balance cost=900, leak_retest cost=300, reject cost=12000. Rules and constraints: Classify packs, simulate rework, and recommend ship/rework/reject. Required work: deliver battery_eol_warranty.xlsx + quality_gate_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
